title: CaveLib
body:
## Most of the code was taken from [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)!
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56cf587c8f76c2ae60fa788a4ad89a7492a3e7b9.png)

A library based on Alex's caves code that allows you to easily create your caves without original mod. The mod currently includes visual effects and cave generation. Wroten for Cryptic Caves but of course you can use it for your projects.

A detailed guide is on the [wiki](https://github.com/b04ka1/CaveLib/wiki)

Example of a cave:
![Example Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3610af8b317214beb1b260a14104e30bda413724.png)
**Logo by Rezolvv**
